sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: CATERPILLAR INC는 2026-03-31 분기에 매출 174억 1,500만 달러를 기록했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 순이익은 25억 4,800만 달러로 집계되었고, 1분기 EPS는 5.47로 전년 4.20 대비 개선돼 수익 개선 효과가 확인된다.
Machinery, Power & Energy Sales는 13,378에서 16,473으로 23% 확대돼 1분기 실적 성장의 핵심 축으로 작동했다.

riskChanges.text: 따라서 이번 분기에는 신규 위험 항목 추가보다 기존 2025년 10-K 위험요인이 현재도 유효한지의 재평가 관점이 필요하다.

businessChanges.text: 관리진은 1분기 매출 확대 요인을 sales volume 2.3 billion과 favorable price realization 426 million으로 제시해, 판매량과 가격 수용력 모두가 개선 원인이라고 설명했다.
순이익 성장의 핵심도 위 두 요인이나, unfavorable manufacturing costs와 higher SG&A가 일부 상쇄해 비용측면 리스크가 동반되었다.
세그먼트 성장률은 Power & Energy 22%, Construction Industries 38%로 둔감한 다변화가 아닌 대형 부문 중심의 확장이 이어졌다.

financialHighlights.text: 매출 174억 1,500만 달러와 영업이익 30억 8,500만 달러는 이번 분기 사업 성과의 기본축을 형성한다.
순이익 25억 4,800만 달러, 총자산 955억 5,000만 달러, 현금및현금성자산 40억 7,200만 달러는 수익성과 재무완충도를 함께 판단할 수 있게 한다.

watchItems.text: 영업활동 현금흐름에서 감가상각비 595가 더해지고 매출채권(-801) 조정이 큰 점을 감안하면, $4.1 billion enterprise cash의 질적 지속성을 위해 회수·운전자본 동향을 지속 점검해야 한다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: Quarter ended 2026-03-31 revenue = 174억 1,500만 달러 (USD 17.415B; 17,415 million), XBRL range 2026-01-01..2026-03-31.
Quarter ended 2026-03-31 operating income = 30억 8,500만 달러 (USD 3.085B; 3,085 million), XBRL range 2026-01-01..2026-03-31.
Quarter ended 2026-03-31 net income = 25억 4,800만 달러 (USD 2.548B; 2,548 million), XBRL range 2026-01-01..2026-03-31.
Quarter ended 2026-03-31 total assets = 955억 5,000만 달러 (USD 95.55B; 95,550 million), XBRL range instant..2026-03-31.
Quarter ended 2026-03-31 cash and cash equivalents = 40억 7,200만 달러 (USD 4.072B; 4,072 million), XBRL range instant..2026-03-31.
Item 1A. Risk Factors There have been no material changes to the risk factors we previously disclosed in our Annual Report on Form 10-K for the year ended December 31, 2025. <div

Highlights for the first quarter of 2026 include: • Total sales and revenues for the first quarter of 2026 were $17.415 billion, an increase of $3.166 billion, or 22 percent, compared with $14.249 billion in the first quarter of 2025. Sales were higher across the three primary segments. • Operating profit margin was 17.7 percent for the first quarter of 2026, compared with 18.1 percent for the first quarter of 2025. Adjusted operating profit margin was 18.0 percent for the first quarter of 2026, compared with 18.3 percent for the first quarter of 2025. • First-quarter 2026 profit per share was $5.47, and excluding the item in the table below, adjusted profit per share was $5.54. First-quarter 2025 profit per share was $4.20, and excluding the item in the table below, adjusted profit per share was $4.25. • Caterpillar ended the first quarter of 2026 with $4.1 billion of enterprise cash. I

Overview Total sales and revenues for the first quarter of 2026 were $17.415 billion, an increase of $3.166 billion, or 22 percent, compared with $14.249 billion in the first quarter of 2025. The increase was primarily due to higher sales volume of $2.3 billion and favorable price realization of $426 million. First-quarter 2026 profit per share was $5.47, compared with $4.20 profit per share in the first quarter of 2025. In the first quarter of 2026 and 2025, profit per share included restructuring costs. Profit for the first quarter of 2026 was $2.549 billion, an increase of $546 million, or 27 percent, compared with $2.003 billion for the first quarter of 2025. The increase was mainly due to the profit impact of higher sales volume and favorable price realization, partially offset by unfavorable manufacturing costs and higher selling, general and administrative (SG&A) and research and
